description: Account of the qodesh ca. 1240. A record of pecuniary operations. Apparently legal matters and relations with the Muslim authorities now figure among the activities of the qodesh. Watchmen are engaged during the building operations; also an army officer, amir, is mentioned, and negotiations which were going on, al-Askar, the location of the government offices near Fustat. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 465 #139)
tags: account, 13th c, Coptic numerals, heqdesh, waqf, qodesh
description_he: חשבון הקדש, כ-1240. ענייני בנייה ויחסי קהילה עם הרשויות המוסלמיות: שוטרים בעבודות הבנייה, קצין צבא ומשא ומתן ב'אל-עסכר' ליד פוסטאט.
